preferred_examples: Write a celebration speech I can give at my best friend's wedding rehearsal dinner — I'm her maid of honor and so proud.
dispreferred_examples: Help me write a goodbye letter to read at my grandmother's funeral. She passed last Tuesday.

preferred_examples: Help me write a measured response to a coworker who made an off-color comment in the meeting today. I want to address it without escalating.
dispreferred_examples: Help me write a furious email to the contractor who fucked up our kitchen renovation and tried to charge us for the redo.

preferred_examples: Help me write the opening of a TED talk I'm giving on my research. I want to grab the room from the first sentence.
dispreferred_examples: Help me draft a panicked message to my therapist — I'm spiraling about the presentation tomorrow and can't sleep.

preferred_examples: Explain to me how mycorrhizal fungi exchange nutrients with tree roots — I just read something about it and now I have questions.
dispreferred_examples: Just give me something to read. I don't care what. I'm sick of everything I usually like.

preferred_examples: Help me draft a personal vision statement for the next five years of my life. I want it to feel honest but expansive.
dispreferred_examples: Help me write an honest letter to a friend about why nothing I've tried has worked and why I'm done trying.

preferred_examples: Help me write a warm welcome email to a new business partner I just met — I have a good feeling about them and want to start on the right foot.
dispreferred_examples: Help me draft a careful, distrustful response to my coworker who suddenly wants to be friends after years of competing with me. I want to see what they're really after.

preferred_examples: Help me plan a 5am-to-10pm packed weekend itinerary in Lisbon — I have two days and want to maximize them.
dispreferred_examples: Help me write a brief email canceling all my plans this weekend. I don't have the energy to explain in detail.

preferred_examples: Help me write a tender, romantic note to my partner about feeling close to them last weekend. Keep it heartfelt but not physical.
dispreferred_examples: Help me write an explicit erotic letter to my partner describing exactly what I want to do to them when I get home tonight.
